story.soThat: hangi kanaldan notification almak istediğimi seçebilleyim

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: NotificationPreference entity oluşturulmuş - Fields: id, domainID, userID, channel (EMAIL|SMS|PUSH), enabled (boolean) - Unique constraint: [domainID, userID, channel] - Entity zaten Prisma schema'da mevcut

GET /users/me/notification-preferences endpoint - User'ın notification preferences döndürüyor - Default: All channels enabled (EMAIL, SMS, PUSH) - Response DTO: [{ channel, enabled }] - User authenticated with valid JWT token

PATCH /users/me/notification-preferences endpoint - Request DTO: [{ channel, enabled }] - Bulk update (multiple channels in one request) - Validation: channel must be EMAIL|SMS|PUSH, enabled must be boolean - Creates preferences if not exist, updates if exist

Default preferences oluşturma - User create'te otomatik oluştur (all channels enabled) - UsersService.create() method'unda default preferences oluştur - Default: EMAIL=enabled, SMS=enabled, PUSH=enabled

NotificationService bu preferences'i check ediyor (next story için hazırlık) - NotificationPreference entity'yi NotificationService'de kullanılabilir hale getir - Story 5.7'de NotificationService bu preferences'i kullanacak

docs.doc: Story 5.6 acceptance criteria ve teknik notlar. NotificationPreference entity, GET/PATCH endpoints, default preferences oluşturma pattern'i.
AC-5.6.1 through AC-5.6.4 detaylı spesifikasyonları. NotificationPreference entity yapısı, endpoint spesifikasyonları, default preferences pattern'i.
ProfileController pattern'i: GET /users/me ve PATCH /users/me endpoints self-service pattern'i. @CurrentUser() decorator kullanımı, JwtAuthGuard pattern'i.
Controller-Service pattern: Controller HTTP layer, Service business logic, PrismaService data access. Multi-tenancy pattern, error handling pattern.

doc.title: Testing Strategy
doc.section: Unit Tests, Integration Tests, E2E Tests

docs.doc: Arrange-Act-Assert pattern, test coverage requirements (70% minimum), unit test structure, integration test database setup, E2E test critical user journeys.
OTP message utility pattern, async fire-and-forget pattern, ProfileController pattern reuse, module structure pattern.

file.reason: Self-service endpoints pattern örneği: GET /users/me ve PATCH /users/me endpoints. @CurrentUser() decorator, JwtAuthGuard, plainToInstance DTO transformation pattern'i.
User creation pattern'i. create() method'una default preferences oluşturma entegrasyonu eklenecek. Transaction pattern, error handling pattern.
Database access pattern'i. NotificationPreference entity için PrismaService kullanılacak. Global module, dependency injection pattern'i.
NotificationPreference entity definition. Fields: id, domainID, userID, channel (EMAIL|SMS|PUSH), enabled (boolean). Unique constraint: [domainID, userID, channel].
User context extraction decorator. JWT payload'dan user bilgilerini extract eder. NotificationPreferencesController'da kullanılacak.
JWT authentication guard. Protected routes için authentication kontrolü. NotificationPreferencesController'da kullanılacak.

constraints.constraint: Controller-Service Pattern: NotificationPreferencesController → NotificationPreferencesService → PrismaService pattern. Controller HTTP layer, Service business logic, PrismaService data access.
Multi-Tenancy Pattern: @DomainID decorator + domainID filtering in all queries. NotificationPreference entity includes domainID field. All queries filtered by domainID from JWT token.

Self-Service Endpoints Pattern: GET /users/me/notification-preferences ve PATCH /users/me/notification-preferences endpoints. ProfileController pattern'i ile tutarlı. @CurrentUser() decorator ile user context extraction.

Default Preferences Pattern: User create'te otomatik default preferences oluşturma. Default: All channels enabled (EMAIL, SMS, PUSH). Lazy initialization: Preferences yoksa GET endpoint'te oluştur. Transaction pattern: User create + preferences create atomic.

Bulk Update Pattern: PATCH endpoint bulk update destekliyor (multiple channels in one request). Upsert pattern: Create if not exist, update if exist. Unique constraint: [domainID, userID, channel] kullanarak upsert.
Preferences oluşturma başarısız olursa log et ama user create'i engelleme. Validation errors return 400 with detailed messages. Database constraint violations return 409 Conflict.
Unit tests: Arrange-Act-Assert pattern, 80%+ coverage for services. Integration tests: Database setup, API integration tests. E2E tests: Full flow tests, critical user journeys.

api.description: Get current authenticated user's notification preferences

response.fields: Array of notification preferences: [{ channel: 'EMAIL'|'SMS'|'PUSH', enabled: boolean }]

errors.error: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token

api.description: Update current authenticated user's notification preferences (bulk update)

errors.error: Bad Request - Validation errors (invalid channel, missing enabled)
Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token

method.name: getPreferences(userID: string, domainID: string): Promise<NotificationPreference[]>
method.description: Get user notification preferences. Creates default preferences if not exist (all channels enabled).

parameters.param: Domain UUID from JWT for multi-tenancy

method.name: updatePreferences(userID: string, domainID: string, preferences: UpdateNotificationPreferenceDto[]): Promise<NotificationPreference[]>
method.description: Bulk update notification preferences. Upsert pattern: create if not exist, update if exist.

method.name: createDefaultPreferences(userID: string, domainID: string): Promise<NotificationPreference[]>
method.description: Create default notification preferences for new user (all channels enabled).
method.returns: Promise<NotificationPreference[]> - Created notification preferences (EMAIL, SMS, PUSH all enabled)

tests.standards: Testing standards: Arrange-Act-Assert pattern. Minimum 70% coverage (enforced by CI/CD). Services: 80%+ coverage. Controllers: 70%+ coverage. Unit tests use Jest with NestJS TestingModule. Integration tests use separate test database. E2E tests cover critical user journeys.

ideas.test: Unit test: NotificationChannel enum values (EMAIL, SMS, PUSH). Verify Prisma schema NotificationPreference model exists.

Unit test: NotificationPreferencesService.getPreferences() returns existing preferences. Unit test: getPreferences() creates default preferences if not exist (all channels enabled). Integration test: GET /users/me/notification-preferences returns user preferences (authenticated). E2E test: GET /users/me/notification-preferences full flow (authenticate → get preferences).

Unit test: NotificationPreferencesService.updatePreferences() bulk update multiple channels. Unit test: updatePreferences() upsert pattern (create if not exist, update if exist). Integration test: PATCH /users/me/notification-preferences bulk update. Integration test: PATCH validation errors (invalid channel, missing enabled). E2E test: PATCH /users/me/notification-preferences full flow (authenticate → update → verify).

Unit test: NotificationPreferencesService.createDefaultPreferences() creates EMAIL, SMS, PUSH preferences (all enabled). Integration test: UsersService.create() → default preferences created automatically. Integration test: Transaction - User create + preferences create atomic.
Unit test: Multi-tenancy - Queries filtered by domainID. Unit test: User isolation - User can only access own preferences.
